name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝑪'𝒎𝒐𝒏! 𝑻𝒂𝒍𝒌 𝒕𝒐 𝒎𝒆!"   |
where you're ignoring Gojo.



______________


ive been catching up with movies for the past few days and wow i have missed out on some good cinema. like i literally watched pride and prejudice for the first time today and wow was i prejudiced to this movie 😭

i thought mr darcy wasn't hot or that interesting when i saw snippets/edits, but after watching that movie i can tell u i live for mr darcy now 😭 i really want to make a pride and prejudice inspired bot now. i think it would work better if i do it with levi though i could also see it working as a geto AU.

let me know which character you'd prefer to see it with and i'll write it (inspired by the earlier scenes where they hate each other lol).

anyways enjoyyy 🫶🏼
